title: Careers at Pensando Systems
text:
This website uses cookies to give you the best experience on our website.  Got it!  Learn more

#### Careers@Pensando Systems

With offices in Silicon Valley, California and Bangalore, India, Pensando Systems has recently been named #4 on Business Insider's list of Enterprise Startups To Bet Your Career On In 2020.

We are seeking exceptional candidates interested in the opportunity to shape and drive the next evolution of the cloud.

The Pensando platform delivers highly programmable software-defined cloud, compute, networking, storage and security services wherever data is located.

As a result we are looking to innovate across Data Center & Cloud environments with opportunities in multiple engineering disciplines including networking, security, containers, storage and ASIC design in addition to sales, support and marketing.

This is a rare opportunity to join a proven team where you will have a healthy work environment with good benefits and the opportunity to earn equity in a company with massive potential, led by a team with an unmatched track record of success.

Pensando is funded for rapid growth – we have recently closed a Series C funding round led by Hewlett Packard Enterprise and Lightspeed Venture Partners which generated $157.45 million in funding. This will bring the total amount raised to $290.45 million after an earlier founder-led series A round of $71 million, and a customer-led series B round of $62 million.

## Why PEnsando?

#### The right team

Pensando is led by Silicon Valley’s legendary “MPLS” team — Mario Mazzola, Prem Jain, Luca Cafiero, Soni Jiandani and Randy Pond — who have an unmatched track record of disruptive innovation having already built eight $Bn+/Year businesses across storage, switching, routing, wireless, voice/video/data, & software-defined networking.

#### The right product

Computing is migrating to where data is being created and new deployment models driven by this shift are no longer just about moving workloads to the cloud but moving scalable services closer to data, regardless of where it resides. This tectonic change is breaking existing infrastructure and requires an entirely new, future-proof architecture designed for the next generation of the cloud. Pensando is the answer: We are democratizing the cloud

#### the right partners

The Pensando platform, a first of its kind, was developed in collaboration with the world’s largest cloud, enterprise, storage, and telecommunications leaders and is supported by partnerships and investments with Hewlett Packard Enterprise, NetApp, Equinix, Lightspeed Ventures, Goldman Sachs and multiple other Fortune 500 customers.
